On this page

Quick Start ​

Get AI Image Renamer up and running in under 2 minutes.

Step 1: Activate the Plugin ​

After installing the plugin, make sure it's activated in Plugins → Installed Plugins.

Step 2: Enter Your API Key ​

  1. Navigate to Media → AI Image Renamer
  2. Paste your Groq API key (starts with gsk_) into the Groq API Key field
  3. Click "Test Connection" to verify it works
  4. Click "Save Changes"

Don't have a key yet?

Get one for free at console.groq.com/keys. No credit card required.

Step 3: Enable Auto-Rename ​

Toggle the "Enable Auto-Rename" switch to ON and save.

Step 4: Upload an Image ​

Go to Media → Add New and upload any image. The plugin will automatically:

  1. Send the image to Groq's Vision API
  2. Analyze the image content
  3. Rename the file with descriptive, SEO-friendly keywords

Before: IMG_20260215_143052.jpgAfter: sunset-over-tropical-beach-palm-trees.jpg

What's Next? ​

  • Configure settings — Choose your AI model, file types, and keyword limits
  • Explore hooks — Customize the plugin's behavior with filters and actions
  • See examples — Learn how to extend the plugin for your specific needs
